text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Mihono Bourbon drops by to see me<n>while I'm
looking over my schedule<n>for today.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me. Could you offer me some<n>words of
advice for my current<n>problem?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Your advice regarding the previous<n>cyborg rumors
was most helpful in<n>resolving the situation.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I am now aware of your<n>problem-solving expertise
and have<n>come seeking your advice once more.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
My problem is that ever since the<n>cyborg rumors
were cleared up, I<n>have seen an increase in
questions<n>regarding my running.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
The other day, my roommate, Nishino<n>Flower,
sought my advice on how to<n>run faster down the
homestretch.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I formulated a hypothesis based on<n>experience
and submitted an answer,<n>but...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I want to run all cool and majestic<n>down the
homestretch just like you,<n>Mihono Bourbon!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
When running down the stretch, I<n>focus on only
generating power in the<n>anteroposterior direction.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Antero... what now?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: My answer did not compute.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I then opted for a different<n>method—training
together on the track.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I expected that cooperative training<n>would bring
about understanding.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Huff! Wheeze... W-wait, please...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I-I can't... keep up...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: That too resulted in failure.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I have therefore decided that I am<n>incapable of
conveying my point and<n>should avoid further
attempts.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
A single piece of advice offered by a<n>professional
would be far more<n>efficient. Would you be able to
guide<n>her?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
...There's something that I can't<n>shake from her
story.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Did Nishino Flower approach her<n>simply because
she wanted some<n>advice?
choice_data_list:
Por que você acha que ela puxou conversa com
você?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: I believe she wanted to learn how to<n>run faster.
choice_data_list: Talvez ela só queira falar contigo.
Talvez ela só queira falar contigo.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I am neither proficient in<n>self-expression nor
suited to social<n>interaction.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
The probability of her wishing to<n>interact with
someone like me is low.
choice_data_list:
Tenho certeza de que você descobrirá a verdade
se tentar conversar com ela.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: ...Understood. I appreciate your input.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Days later, I spot Mihono Bourbon<n>and Nishino
Flower chatting together.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Oh, wow! So you like energy drinks!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I consume energy drinks to improve<n>efficiency
rather than because of<n>preference.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Oh, okay! That definitely sounds like<n>something
you'd do.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
...You know what? I'm glad I'm<n>learning so much
about you, Bourbon!<n>Hehe! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Despite her confusion, I sense some<n>joy in her
emotionless face.
